reference_goals: Volute/casing — spiral geometry, cutwater tongue, discharge flange
Impeller — vane count/profile, wear ring, hub/shroud, balance holes
Mechanical seal — cartridge assembly, gland plate, flush/quench ports
Bearing frame — radial/thrust bearing housing, oil level sight glass, grease fitting
Back-pull-out design — removal sequence, coupling guard, alignment datums
Baseplate and piping — suction/discharge flange orientation, drain/vent plugs
needed_metadata: Hydraulic performance curve (H-Q, efficiency, NPSH) — reference shape only
BOM — impeller material (316SS, duplex, bronze), shaft, mechanical seal type
Maintenance interval checklist — seal replacement, bearing inspection, alignment
needed_engineering_docs: CFD boundary conditions — inlet velocity profile, outlet pressure, wall roughness
Structural — shaft deflection limits, critical speed margin, bearing L10 life
safety_boundary: Design reference and hydraulic grammar only; no operational start/stop procedures or process-specific chemical compatibility claims.
